appraisal_events.evidence: « il n'était pas digne d'un client de causer avec des courrières » … « je me contentai de lui éclater de rire au nez » … « il n'avait finalement pas osé donner tort à la nièce »
appraisal_events.explanation: The director tries to impose a social norm, but the narrator mocks him and his authority proves to be timid and ineffective in the face of the 'taboo' and the behavior of the young girls.

status_effects.explanation: His rhetorical and normative authority is defeated and presented as fearful and ineffective.
